title: Share week
intro: Create a read-only link to show this week to a friend. It is a snapshot - later changes won't appear, and you can revoke it anytime.
privacyNote: Attachments are never shared. Notes are included only if you turn them on.
revokeConfirmBody: The link will stop working. This can't be undone.

missing.title: This link no longer works
missing.body: The owner may have revoked it, or it never existed.

error.title: Couldn't load this page
error.body: Check your connection and try again.
